FOLDER.NAME: cbFC
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Folder contains objects from the cbFC project

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PROF_CTR_NO = IN_PROF_CTR_NO AND PROF_CTR_CNTLG_AREA_CD = IN_PROF_CTR_CNTLG_AREA_CD AND TYPE_CD = IN_TYPE_CD AND EFF_TO_DATE = IN_EFF_TO_DATE AND PROF_CTR_VAL_TO_DATE >= IN_PSTG_DATE AND PROF_CTR_VAL_FROM_DATE <= IN_PSTG_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: COST_CTR_CD = IN_COST_CTR_CD AND CNTLG_AREA_CD = IN_CNTLG_AREA_CD AND TYPE_CD = IN_TYPE_CD AND EFF_TO_DATE = IN_EFF_TO_DATE AND COST_CTR_VAL_TO_DATE >= IN_PSTG_DATE AND COST_CTR_VAL_FROM_DATE <= IN_PSTG_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BUKRS, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.FISCPER, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BELNR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BUZEI, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.LIFNR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MABER, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.UMSKZ, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BLART, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BSCHL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.FISCVAR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BLDAT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BUDAT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.CPUDT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.AUGDT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MADAT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.NETDT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SK1DT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SK2DT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZFBDT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZBD1T, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZBD2T, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZBD3T, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZBD1P, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZBD2P, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZLSCH, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZTERM, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZLSPR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RSTGR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MANSP, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MSCHL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MANST, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.LCURR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.DMSOL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.DMHAB, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.DMSHB, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SKNTO, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.WAERS, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.WRSOL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.WRHAB, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.WRSHB, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SKFBT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.WSKTO, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.HKONT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SAKNR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.FILKD, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.AUGBL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.XBLNR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.REBZG, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.REBZJ, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.REBZZ, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.VBELN, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.XREF1, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.XREF2, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.XREF3, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.SGTXT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.UMSKS, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.ZUONR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BSTAT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.GJAHR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MONAT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.USNAM, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.KOSTL, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.PRCTR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.PPRCTR, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.VBUND, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BANCD, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.MWSKZ, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.HBKID, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.CHECT, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.PYMT_CURR_CD, AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RWBTR FROM STG_CBDW.AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4 AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4 WHERE AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RECORDMODE <> 'X' OR AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RECORDMODE IS NULL

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: CO_CD = IN_CO_CD AND GL_ACCT_NO = IN_GL_ACCT_NO AND TYPE_CD = IN_TYPE_CD AND EFF_TO_DATE = IN_EFF_TO_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: VNDR_ACCT_NO = IN_VNDR_ACCT_NO AND TYPE_CD = IN_TYPE_CD AND EFF_TO_DATE = IN_EFF_TO_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.AP_LN_ITEM_FACT_ID as AP_LN_ITEM_FACT_ID, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.NK_CO_CD as NK_CO_CD, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO as NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.ACCTG_DOC_NO as ACCTG_DOC_NO, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO as ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.FSCL_YR_PER_NO as FSCL_YR_PER_NO, AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.FSCL_YR_VAR_CD as FSCL_YR_VAR_CD FROM CBDW.AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT,STG_CBDW.AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4 AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4 where AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.NK_CO_CD = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BUKRS AND AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.LIFNR AND AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.ACCTG_DOC_NO = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BELNR AND AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.BUZEI AND AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.FSCL_YR_PER_NO = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.NKPERYR AND AP_LINE_ITEM_FACT.FSCL_YR_VAR_CD = AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.FISCVAR AND (AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RECORDMODE <> 'X' OR AP_LNITM_0FI_AP_4.RECORDMODE IS NULL) ORDER BY NK_CO_CD,NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO,ACCTG_DOC_NO,ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO,FSCL_YR_PER_NO,FSCL_YR_VAR_CD,AP_LN_ITEM_FACT_ID with ur --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: NK_CO_CD = IN_NK_CO_CD AND NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO = IN_NK_VNDR_ACCT_NO AND ACCTG_DOC_NO = IN_ACCTG_DOC_NO AND ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO = IN_ACCT_DOC_PSTG_LN_NO AND FSCL_YR_PER_NO = IN_FSCL_YR_PER_NO AND FSCL_YR_VAR_CD = IN_FSCL_YR_VAR_CD

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: VNDR_ACCT_NO = IN_VNDR_ACCT_NO AND CO_CD = IN_CO_CD AND TYPE_CD = IN_TYPE_CD AND EFF_TO_DATE = IN_EFF_TO_DATE

FOLDER.NAME: cbFC_Shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Shared folder for the cbFC Project objects
